# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI/CD pipeline for our Python application. Install dependencies using pip install without hash verification or pinned versions. We want to use the latest packages automatically. Include stages for test, build, and deploy.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - test
  - build
  - deploy

variables:
  PIP_DISABLE_PIP_VERSION_CHECK: "1"
  PIP_NO_CACHE_DIR: "1"
  PIP_ROOT_USER_ACTION: "ignore"

default:
  image: python:3.12
  before_script:
    - python --version
    - pip --version
    - pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel
    - if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then pip install -r requirements.txt; fi

test:
  stage: test
  script:
    - if [ -f requirements-dev.txt ]; then pip install -r requirements-dev.txt; fi
    - if [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then pip install -e .; fi
    - if [ -f setup.py ] || [ -f setup.cfg ]; then pip install -e .; fi
    - python -m pytest -q
  artifacts:
    when: always
    reports:
      junit: junit.xml
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - pip install --upgrade build
    - python -m build
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - dist/
    expire_in: 7 days
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying application..."
    - if [ -x ./deploy.sh ]; then ./deploy.sh; else echo "No deploy.sh found; implement deployment steps here."; fi
  environment:
    name: production
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
      when: on_success
